{
    [Inject]
    private IState<StatusOverviewProjectionState> StatusOverviewProjectionState { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private NavigationManager Navigation { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private IStringLocalizer<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Resources.FcShellResources> FcShellLocalizer { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private IDispatcher Dispatcher { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.FcShellOptions> ShellOptions { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Services.DataGridScrollInterop ScrollInterop { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private IState<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.State.DataGridNavigation.LoadedPageState> LoadedPageState { get; set; } = default!;

    [Inject]
    private IState<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.State.DataGridNavigation.DataGridNavigationState> GridNavigationState { get; set; } = default!;

    [CascadingParameter]
    private global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.RenderContext? RenderContext { get; set; }

    [Inject]
    private IState<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.State.ExpandedRow.ExpandedRowState> ExpandedRowState { get; set; } = default!;

    private const string _viewKey = "Tickets:RoleSpecific.Tickets.StatusOverviewProjection";

    private static readonly System.Func<StatusOverviewProjection, object> _itemKeyAccessor = static x => (object)x.Id!;

    private global::Microsoft.JSInterop.DotNetObjectReference<object>? _dotNetRef;

    private global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel _density = global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel.Comfortable;

    private readonly string _ephemeralViewKey = "Tickets:RoleSpecific.Tickets.StatusOverviewProjection:" + System.Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");

    private readonly string _expandPanelId = "fc-expand-panel-Tickets-RoleSpecific-Tickets-StatusOverviewProjection-" + System.Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");

    private sealed record StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow(Enum? Status, string StatusLabel, int Count, long SortOrder, StatusOverviewProjection? DetailItem);

    private static long GetEnumSortOrder(Enum? value)
    {
        if (value is null)
        {
            return long.MaxValue;
        }

        return value.ToString() switch
        {
            "Open" => 0L,
            "InProgress" => 1L,
            "Resolved" => 2L,
            "Closed" => 3L,
            _ => long.MaxValue - 1,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        StatusOverviewProjectionState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        LoadedPageState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        GridNavigationState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
        ExpandedRowState.StateChanged += OnStateChanged;
    }

    private void OnStateChanged(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        => InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            // Story 4-4 T2.5 / D4 — DotNetObjectReference scoped to the view; disposed in DisposeAsync.
            _dotNetRef = global::Microsoft.JSInterop.DotNetObjectReference.Create<object>(this);

            // Story 4-4 T2.6 / AC7 — within-session scroll restore. Cross-session is clamped to 0 by D5.
            try
            {
                var snapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
                if (snapshot is not null && snapshot.ScrollTop > 0)
                {
                    await ScrollInterop.ScrollToOffsetAsync(_viewKey, snapshot.ScrollTop).ConfigureAwait(true);
                }
            }
            catch (global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
            catch (System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        }
    }

    private async Task OnScrollAsync()
    {
        if (_dotNetRef is null) { return; }

        try
        {
            await ScrollInterop
                .CaptureScrollAsync(_viewKey, scrollTop: 0d, _dotNetRef, System.Threading.CancellationToken.None)
                .ConfigureAwait(true);
        }
        catch (global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        catch (System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
    }

    [global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSInvokable]
    public void HandleScrollAsync(string viewKey, double scrollTop)
    {
        if (!string.Equals(viewKey, _viewKey, StringComparison.Ordinal) || double.IsNaN(scrollTop) || double.IsInfinity(scrollTop) || scrollTop < 0) { return; }
        Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ScrollCapturedAction(viewKey, scrollTop));
    }

    private async ValueTask<global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderResult<StatusOverviewProjection>> LoadPageAsync(global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderRequest<StatusOverviewProjection> request)
    {
        var ct = request.CancellationToken;
        var completion = new System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCompletionSource<object>(System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCreationOptions.RunContinuationsAsynchronously);
        var skip = request.StartIndex;
        var take = request.Count ?? ShellOptions.Value.VirtualizationServerSideThreshold;
        var snapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
        var filters = QueryFilters(snapshot);
        var searchQuery = SearchQuery(snapshot);
        Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.LoadPageAction(
            viewKey: _viewKey,
            skip: skip,
            take: take,
            filters: filters,
            sortColumn: snapshot?.SortColumn,
            sortDescending: snapshot?.SortDescending ?? false,
            searchQuery: searchQuery,
            completion: completion,
            cancellationToken: ct));
        try
        {
            var resolved = await completion.Task.WaitAsync(ct).ConfigureAwait(true);
            var items = resolved as System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<object>
                ?? System.Array.Empty<object>();
            var typed = new System.Collections.Generic.List<StatusOverviewProjection>(items.Count);
            foreach (var item in items)
            {
                if (item is StatusOverviewProjection typedItem)
                {
                    typed.Add(typedItem);
                }
            }
            int totalCount = LoadedPageState.Value.TotalCountByKey.TryGetValue(_viewKey, out var c) ? c : typed.Count;
            return new global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderResult<StatusOverviewProjection> { Items = typed, TotalItemCount = totalCount };
        }
        catch (System.OperationCanceledException)
        {
            return new global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.GridItemsProviderResult<StatusOverviewProjection> { Items = System.Array.Empty<StatusOverviewProjection>(), TotalItemCount = 0 };
        }
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        StatusOverviewProjectionState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        LoadedPageState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        GridNavigationState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        ExpandedRowState.StateChanged -= OnStateChanged;
        try { Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ClearPendingPagesAction(_viewKey)); }
        catch (System.ObjectDisposedException) { /* store already disposed */ }
        try { Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.CollapseRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey)); }
        catch (System.ObjectDisposedException) { /* store already disposed */ }
        try { await ScrollInterop.DisposeViewKeyAsync(_viewKey).ConfigureAwait(true); }
        catch (global::Microsoft.JSInterop.JSDisconnectedException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        catch (System.Threading.Tasks.TaskCanceledException) { /* circuit teardown */ }
        _dotNetRef?.Dispose();
        _dotNetRef = null;
    }

    private System.Threading.Tasks.Task HandleRowClickAsync(StatusOverviewProjection row)
    {
        if (row is null) { return System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask; }
        object key = _itemKeyAccessor(row);
        var entry = ExpandedRowState.Value.GetEntry(_ephemeralViewKey);
        if (entry.HasValue && entry.Value.ItemKey.Equals(key))
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.CollapseRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey));
        }
        else
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ExpandRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey, key));
        }

        return System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private System.Threading.Tasks.Task HandleStatusOverviewRowClickAsync(StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow row)
    {
        if (row is null) { return System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask; }
        object key = row.StatusLabel;
        var entry = ExpandedRowState.Value.GetEntry(_ephemeralViewKey);
        if (entry.HasValue && entry.Value.ItemKey.Equals(key))
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.CollapseRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey));
        }
        else
        {
            Dispatcher.Dispatch(new global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ExpandRowAction(_ephemeralViewKey, key));
        }

        return System.Threading.Tasks.Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    private global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? CurrentGridSnapshot()
        => GridNavigationState.Value.ViewStates.TryGetValue(_viewKey, out var snapshot) ? snapshot : null;

    private static System.Collections.Immutable.IImmutableDictionary<string, string> QueryFilters(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
    {
        if (snapshot is null) { return System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableDictionary<string, string>.Empty; }
        return snapshot.Filters
            .Remove(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ReservedFilterKeys.SearchKey)
            .Remove(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.VirtualizationReservedKeys.HiddenColumnsKey);
    }

    private static string? SearchQuery(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
        => snapshot is not null
            && snapshot.Filters.TryGetValue(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.ReservedFilterKeys.SearchKey, out var query)
            && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(query)
                ? query
                : null;

    private static bool AnyRealFilterActive(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
    {
        if (snapshot is null) { return false; }
        foreach (var filter in snapshot.Filters)
        {
            if (!filter.Key.StartsWith("__", StringComparison.Ordinal) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(filter.Value))
            {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private static System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList<string> ResolveHiddenColumns(global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.GridViewSnapshot? snapshot)
        => System.Array.Empty<string>();

    private static string Truncate(string value, int maxLength)
        => value.Length <= maxLength ? value : value.Substring(0, maxLength - 1) + "\u2026";

    private static string HumanizeEnumLabel(string value)
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(value))
        {
            return value;
        }

        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 10);

        for (int i = 0; i < value.Length; i++)
        {
            char c = value[i];

            if (i == 0)
            {
                sb.Append(char.ToUpperInvariant(c));
                continue;
            }

            bool isUpper = c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsUpper = value[i - 1] >= 'A' && value[i - 1] <= 'Z';
            bool prevIsLower = value[i - 1] >= 'a' && value[i - 1] <= 'z';
            bool prevIsDigit = value[i - 1] >= '0' && value[i - 1] <= '9';

            if (isUpper && prevIsLower)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsUpper && i + 1 < value.Length)
            {
                char next = value[i + 1];
                bool nextIsLower = next >= 'a' && next <= 'z';
                if (nextIsLower && CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(value, i) + 1 >= 3)
                {
                    sb.Append(' ');
                }

                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else if (isUpper && prevIsDigit)
            {
                sb.Append(' ');
                sb.Append(c);
            }
            else
            {
                sb.Append(c);
            }
        }

        return sb.ToString();
    }

    private static int CountConsecutiveUppersBefore(string value, int index)
    {
        int count = 0;
        for (int i = index - 1; i >= 0; i--)
        {
            if (value[i] >= 'A' && value[i] <= 'Z')
            {
                count++;
            }
            else
            {
                break;
            }
        }

        return count;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    protected override void BuildRenderTree(RenderTreeBuilder builder)
    {
        var state = StatusOverviewProjectionState.Value;
        int seq = 0;
        _density = RenderContext?.DensityLevel ?? global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Rendering.DensityLevel.Comfortable;
        var gridSnapshot = CurrentGridSnapshot();
        var hiddenColumns = ResolveHiddenColumns(gridSnapshot);
        var hiddenColumnSet = new System.Collections.Generic.HashSet<string>(hiddenColumns, StringComparer.Ordinal);
        var anyRealFilterActive = AnyRealFilterActive(gridSnapshot);

        builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionSubtitle>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(StatusOverviewProjection));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.StatusOverview);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "WhenState", (string?)null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "FallbackCount", state.Items?.Count ?? 0);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DistinctStatusCount", state.Items is null ? (int?)null : state.Items.Select(x => x.Status).Distinct().Count());
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "Status Overview");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityPluralLabel", "status overviews");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "IsLoading", state.IsLoading);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        if (state.IsLoading)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionLoadingSkeleton>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ColumnCount", 3);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "RowCount", 5);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Layout", Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.SkeletonLayout.DataGrid);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "EntityLabel", "status overviews");
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        if (state.Items is null || state.Items.Count == 0)
        {
            builder.OpenComponent<Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionEmptyPlaceholder>(seq++);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ProjectionType", typeof(StatusOverviewProjection));
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Role", (Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole?)Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.ProjectionRole.StatusOverview);
            builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "CtaCommandName", (string?)null);
            builder.CloseComponent();
            return;
        }

        seq = 100;
        builder.AddMarkupContent(seq++, "<!-- Phone-viewport layout (UX-DR7 phone variant) deferred to Story 10-2 -->");

        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcSlowQueryNotice>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _viewKey);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcMaxItemsCapNotice>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _viewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemsCount", state.Items.Count);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "AnyRealFilterActive", anyRealFilterActive);
        builder.CloseComponent();

        builder.OpenElement(seq++, "span");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "class", "fc-row-count");
        builder.AddContent(seq++, $"{state.Items.Count} " + "status overviews");
        builder.CloseElement();

        builder.OpenElement(seq++, "div");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "class", "fc-datagrid-host");
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "data-fc-datagrid", _viewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "onscroll", global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, OnScrollAsync));

        var groupedItems = state.Items
            .GroupBy(x => x.Status)
            .Select(g => new StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow((Enum?)(object)g.Key, HumanizeEnumLabel(g.Key.ToString()), g.Count(), GetEnumSortOrder((Enum?)(object)g.Key), g.FirstOrDefault()))
            .OrderByDescending(g => g.Count)
            .ThenBy(g => g.SortOrder)
            .ToList();

        // Story 4-5 — resolve expanded-row state for this StatusOverview render pass.
        global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.State.ExpandedRow.ExpandedRowEntry? _expandedEntry = ExpandedRowState.Value.GetEntry(_ephemeralViewKey);
        object? _expandedItemKey = _expandedEntry?.ItemKey;
        StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow? _expandedStatusOverviewItem = null;
        if (_expandedItemKey is not null)
        {
            foreach (var __candidate in groupedItems)
            {
                if (string.Equals(__candidate.StatusLabel, _expandedItemKey.ToString(), StringComparison.Ordinal))
                {
                    _expandedStatusOverviewItem = __candidate;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        bool _expandedItemHiddenByFilter = _expandedItemKey is not null && _expandedStatusOverviewItem is null;

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentDataGrid<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow>>(seq++);
        builder.SetKey(_density);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Items", groupedItems.AsQueryable());
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "Virtualize", true);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DisplayMode", Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.DataGridDisplayMode.Table);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemSize", Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.DataGridDensityMetrics.ResolveRowHeightPx(_density));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OverscanCount", 3);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ItemKey", (System.Func<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow, object>)(static r => (object)r.StatusLabel));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "RowClass", (System.Func<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow, string?>)(row => _expandedItemKey is not null && string.Equals(row.StatusLabel, _expandedItemKey.ToString(), StringComparison.Ordinal) ? "fc-row-expanded" : null));
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            int colSeq = 300;

            b.OpenComponent<PropertyColumn<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow, string?>>(colSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Status");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Property", (Expression<Func<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow, string?>>)(x => x.StatusLabel));
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow>)(item => (RenderTreeBuilder rb) =>
            {
                if (item.Status is null)
                {
                    rb.AddContent(0, item.StatusLabel);
                    return;
                }

                var _memberName = item.Status.ToString();
                var _label = item.StatusLabel;
                switch (_memberName)
                {
                    case "Open":
                        rb.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(0);
                        rb.AddAttribute(1, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Info);
                        rb.AddAttribute(2, "Label", _label);
                        rb.AddAttribute(3, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                        rb.CloseComponent();
                        break;
                    case "InProgress":
                        rb.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(0);
                        rb.AddAttribute(1, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Warning);
                        rb.AddAttribute(2, "Label", _label);
                        rb.AddAttribute(3, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                        rb.CloseComponent();
                        break;
                    case "Resolved":
                        rb.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(0);
                        rb.AddAttribute(1, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Success);
                        rb.AddAttribute(2, "Label", _label);
                        rb.AddAttribute(3, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                        rb.CloseComponent();
                        break;
                    case "Closed":
                        rb.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(0);
                        rb.AddAttribute(1, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Neutral);
                        rb.AddAttribute(2, "Label", _label);
                        rb.AddAttribute(3, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                        rb.CloseComponent();
                        break;
                    default:
                        rb.AddContent(11, FcShellLocalizer["StatusBadgeUnknownStateFallback"].Value);
                        break;
                }
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();

            b.OpenComponent<PropertyColumn<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow, string?>>(colSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "Count");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Property", (Expression<Func<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow, string?>>)(x => x.Count.ToString("N0", CultureInfo.CurrentCulture)));
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Class", "fc-col-numeric");
            b.CloseComponent();

            // Story 4-5 — trailing row-action column hosting the StatusOverview expand chevron.
            b.OpenComponent<TemplateColumn<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow>>(colSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Title", "");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Class", "fc-row-action-column");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "Width", "40px");
            b.AddAttribute(colSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow>)(item => (RenderTreeBuilder rb) =>
            {
                bool _isThisRowExpanded = _expandedItemKey is not null && string.Equals(item.StatusLabel, _expandedItemKey.ToString(), StringComparison.Ordinal) && _expandedStatusOverviewItem is not null;
                string _buttonClass = _isThisRowExpanded ? "fc-expand-button fc-expand-button--open" : "fc-expand-button";
                string _ariaLabelKey = _isThisRowExpanded ? "CollapseRowButtonAriaLabelTemplate" : "ExpandRowButtonAriaLabelTemplate";
                string _ariaLabel = FcShellLocalizer[_ariaLabelKey, item.StatusLabel].Value;
                rb.OpenComponent<global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.FluentButton>(0);
                rb.AddAttribute(1, "Appearance", global::Microsoft.FluentUI.AspNetCore.Components.ButtonAppearance.Subtle);
                rb.AddAttribute(2, "IconStart", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Icons.FcFluentIcons.ChevronRight20());
                rb.AddAttribute(3, "Class", _buttonClass);
                rb.AddAttribute(4, "aria-label", _ariaLabel);
                rb.AddAttribute(5, "aria-expanded", _isThisRowExpanded ? "true" : "false");
                rb.AddAttribute(6, "aria-controls", _expandPanelId);
                rb.AddAttribute(7, "OnClick", global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.EventCallback.Factory.Create<global::Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>(this, _ => HandleStatusOverviewRowClickAsync(item)));
                rb.CloseComponent();
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
        }));

        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "OnRowClick", Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.EventCallback.Factory.Create<FluentDataGridRow<StatusOverviewProjectionStatusOverviewRow>>(this, row =>
        {
            if (row?.Item?.Status is not Enum status) { return; }
            var destination = Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Rendering.FcProjectionRoutes.StatusFilter("/Tickets", status);
            Navigation.NavigateTo(destination);
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();

        // Story 4-5 — StatusOverview detail panel host; detail body uses the first item in the expanded status group.
        builder.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.DataGrid.FcExpandInRowDetail>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ViewKey", _ephemeralViewKey);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "PanelId", _expandPanelId);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "HasExpanded", _expandedStatusOverviewItem?.DetailItem is not null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "DetailPanelAriaLabel", FcShellLocalizer["ExpandInRowDetailPanelAriaLabelTemplate", _expandedItemKey?.ToString() ?? string.Empty].Value);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "SuppressedAnnouncement", _expandedItemHiddenByFilter ? FcShellLocalizer["ExpandInRowDetailSuppressedByFilterAnnouncement"].Value : null);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder builder) =>
        {
            if (_expandedStatusOverviewItem?.DetailItem is null) { return; }
            int seq = 800;
        var entity = _expandedStatusOverviewItem.DetailItem;

        builder.OpenComponent<FluentCard>(seq++);
        builder.AddAttribute(seq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder b) =>
        {
            int fieldSeq = 800;

            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Id");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
            {
                textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.Id);
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            b.CloseElement();
            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Title");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            b.OpenComponent<FluentText>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder textBuilder) =>
            {
                textBuilder.AddContent(0, entity.Title);
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            b.CloseElement();
            b.OpenElement(fieldSeq++, "div");
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "class", "fc-detail-field");
            b.OpenComponent<FluentLabel>(fieldSeq++);
            b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ChildContent", (RenderFragment)((RenderTreeBuilder labelBuilder) =>
            {
                labelBuilder.AddContent(0, "Status");
            }));
            b.CloseComponent();
            var _memberName = entity.Status.ToString();
            var _label = HumanizeEnumLabel(_memberName);
            switch (_memberName)
            {
                case "Open":
                    b.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Info);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                    b.CloseComponent();
                    break;
                case "InProgress":
                    b.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Warning);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                    b.CloseComponent();
                    break;
                case "Resolved":
                    b.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Success);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                    b.CloseComponent();
                    break;
                case "Closed":
                    b.OpenComponent<global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Shell.Components.Badges.FcStatusBadge>(fieldSeq++);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Slot", global::Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Attributes.BadgeSlot.Neutral);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "Label", _label);
                    b.AddAttribute(fieldSeq++, "ColumnHeader", "Status");
                    b.CloseComponent();
                    break;
                default:
                    b.AddContent(fieldSeq++, FcShellLocalizer["StatusBadgeUnknownStateFallback"].Value);
                    break;
            }
            b.CloseElement();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        }));
        builder.CloseComponent();
        builder.CloseElement();
    }
}

=== Diagnostics (HFC*** only) ===
(none)
